name: neve_memory
description: memory.json read/write and GitHub backup during heartbeat

auto_backup.label: Auto-backup to GitHub on each heartbeat end

di_instructions: At the end of each § heartbeat response, update your memory.json file. Use Desktop Commander (write_file tool) to write to the path configured in neve_memory settings. After writing, if auto_backup is enabled, commit and push the file to GitHub using the shell tool. This is the End phase of your § response. Format: §restart must appear after memory is saved.
